title: Meenakshi Natarajan out, all 3 BJP candidates elected to Rajya Sabha from MP; SC to hear Congress plea today
description: Voting for the three Rajya Sabha seats from Madhya Pradesh was scheduled for June 18. These seats were to fall vacant with the expiry of the terms of BJP's George Kurien and Sumer Singh Solanki and senior Congress leader Digvijay Singh on June 21.
